summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 1.5 Quick Capture enhancement on mobile viewport (390x844). All backend API tests passed (11/11) and all frontend features verified working correctly.

check_duplicate_endpoint.detail: POST /api/acquisitions/check-duplicate returns matching venues by name, phone, and locality with match_reasons array

quick_capture_mode_stored.detail: POST /api/acquisitions/ with capture_mode='quick' correctly stores the field in database

full_capture_mode_stored.detail: POST /api/acquisitions/ with capture_mode='full' correctly stores the field

default_capture_mode.detail: Default capture_mode is 'full' when not specified

incomplete_quick_capture_cannot_submit.detail: Quick capture draft cannot be submitted if mandatory fields missing (returns 400 with missing fields list)

complete_quick_capture_can_submit.detail: Quick capture with all 8 mandatory fields can be submitted for review

list_acquisitions_returns_capture_mode.detail: GET /api/acquisitions/?my_only=true returns capture_mode field on each record

dashboard_quick_capture_button.detail: /team/field dashboard shows 'Quick Capture' primary button (gold) with Zap icon

dashboard_full_button.detail: /team/field dashboard shows 'Full' secondary button (white) with Plus icon

quick_mode_badge.detail: Quick Capture form shows 'QUICK MODE' badge in header

required_fields_present.detail: All required fields present: venue name, venue type (pill buttons), contact name, phone, city, locality, capacity presets (tap buttons), interest level (4-button grid)

optional_fields_present.detail: Optional section present: starting price, photo button, follow-up date, notes

quick_capture_saves_and_navigates.detail: Quick Capture saves successfully and navigates back to /team/field dashboard

quick_badge_on_dashboard.detail: Dashboard shows QUICK badge (gold) on quick capture drafts - found 7 badges

quick_draft_hint_message.detail: Dashboard shows 'Quick draft — open to complete full details before submitting' hint for quick drafts

click_quick_draft_opens_full_form.detail: Clicking a quick draft card opens the full capture form at /team/field/capture/{id}

duplicate_warning_appears.detail: Duplicate warning appears when entering venue with same name/phone/locality that already exists

duplicate_warning_shows_match_reasons.detail: Duplicate warning shows match reasons (same_phone, same_locality) and venue details

duplicate_warning_actions.detail: 'Continue anyway' and 'Go back' buttons present in duplicate warning

no_false_positive_duplicates.detail: No duplicate warning for unique venue names (correct behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: QuickCaptureScreen.js: Well-structured single-screen form with proper data-testid attributes, debounced duplicate check on blur, capacity presets as tap buttons, interest level as 4-button grid
SpecialistDashboard.js: Correctly shows QUICK badge and hint message for quick capture drafts, proper visual separation between Quick Capture (primary gold) and Full (secondary white) buttons
acquisitions.py: check-duplicate endpoint uses regex for name matching and exact match for phone/locality, returns match_reasons array for UI display
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed acquisitions during backend testing for duplicate detection verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1.5 Quick Capture fully tested and working. Routes: /team/field (dashboard with Quick Capture + Full buttons), /team/field/quick (quick capture form). Backend: POST /api/acquisitions/check-duplicate for dedupe, capture_mode field stored on acquisitions. Quick captures show QUICK badge on dashboard and hint message. Clicking quick draft opens full capture form for completion.
